| Time          |   | Activity                       |
| ------------- |---| ------------------------------ |
| 11:00 - 11:15 | 👋 | Intro                          |
| 11:15 - 12:00 | 💬 | Anatomy of a conversation      |
| 12:00 - 12:40 | 💻 | Programming with LLMs          |
| 12:40 - 12:50 | ☕ | Break                          |
| 12:50 - 13:15 | ✍️  | Prompt engineering             |
| 13:15 - 13:50 | 🛠️  | Tool calling                   |
| 13:50 - 14:00 | 🎁 | Wrap-up and resources          |
